resources.string: Live Gold Price: %1$s AED. Tap to check all rates.
Today\'s gold price in UAE for 24K is %1$s %2$s. The global gold ounce price is %3$s USD, equivalent to %4$s AED. The market is currently stable.
The calculated value is approximate and does not include making charges, VAT, or retailer margin.

Displayed prices are indicative raw gold rates per gram. Jewellery shop prices may differ due to making charges, VAT, and retailer margins. This app does not provide financial or investment advice and does not guarantee price accuracy at all times.
Prices are fetched from third-party data sources and may be delayed or differ from live market rates.
The app may use third-party advertising services such as Google AdMob. These services may collect data such as advertising ID, device information, and ad interaction data according to their policies.
